chain.thought: Explanation: The back of shirt sponsor column is blank through 2008. Starting in 2009–2011 it lists PSU Technology Group, and subsequent rows also have back sponsors. Therefore, the last year without a back sponsor is 2008.

judge_thought: Explanation: The "back of shirt sponsor" column is blank for all entries up to 2008. Starting in 2009–2011, the back sponsor appears as "psu technology group," with subsequent years also having back sponsors. Therefore, the last year without a back sponsor is 2008, not null.
